_comment: Copy to config.json and fill in your values.
_excluded_comment: Run 'docker compose exec bot python -m connectors.calendar' to list all calendar IDs.
_monitor_channels_comment: Channels where Eva only runs security checks (no LLM routing). Map channel_id (as string) → list of user IDs allowed to post there without triggering an alert. The owner (discord_user_id) is always implicitly authorized.
